project_name: Matthew Raynor Photography Store & AI Shopping Assistant
summary: A full e-commerce platform for fine art photography targeting the Hamptons luxury art market, featuring an AI-powered shopping assistant built with LangChain and Claude that searches photos semantically, manages carts, and lets customers visualize prints on their walls.
description: The Matthew Raynor Photography Store is an e-commerce platform for fine art photography prints targeting the Hamptons luxury art market. The store sells archival paper prints, dye-sublimated aluminum prints, a photography book, and gift cards through Stripe Checkout with support for gift card redemption and promotional codes.

ai_agent.description: AI-powered shopping assistant built with LangChain and Claude, streamed to the frontend over Server-Sent Events.
capabilities: Semantic photo search using pgvector embeddings for natural language queries
Cart management — add, remove, view items through conversation
Photo filtering by descriptions, colors, mood, and subjects
Answer questions about sizing, materials, and pricing
ai_agent.embeddings: Photo embeddings are generated using OpenAI's text-embedding-ada-002 and stored in PostgreSQL with pgvector for cosine similarity search.
ai_agent.metadata: Claude Vision auto-generates all photo metadata (descriptions, colors, mood, subjects) stored with vector embeddings.

see_in_room_feature.description: ML-powered wall visualization that lets customers see prints in their own space
see_in_room_feature.technology: MiDaS depth estimation + RANSAC plane-fitting composites prints at correct scale on customer-uploaded wall photos

ecommerce_features: Session-based cart persistence with cross-origin cookie handling
Gift card redemption and promotional codes
Honeypot spam protection on contact form
Automated order confirmation emails via Resend SMTP
architecture_notes: The frontend uses Next.js App Router with server-side rendering. The architecture separates server components (using internal API URLs) from client components (using public API URLs) for efficient data fetching.
why_this_matters: This project demonstrates production agentic AI — not just a chatbot, but an AI agent that takes real actions on behalf of customers. Semantic search, cart management, wall visualization, and full e-commerce in one platform.
